title: Prior-Product Audit, Maintenance Reality, and Reframed Challenge · Claim Repair Board
summary: A preserved decision record for prior-product audit, maintenance reality, and reframed challenge contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in maintenance audit and reframed product charter and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, c…
objectives: Audit which prior claims survived real use, changed data, dependency drift, support, accessibility, security, and recovery conditions.
Classify feedback by user outcome, evidence source, frequency, severity, reach, confidence, and strategic fit.
Measure dependency, defect, support, content, data, infrastructure, and cognitive maintenance cost before adding scope.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-2 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-2
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Production Vs Demo
steps.instruction:
debug case — A first product has dependency drift, support burden, unresolved accessibility feedback, stale assumptions, and pressure for a feature-rich sequel. The debug variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Audit which prior claims survived real use, changed data, dependency drift, support, accessibility, security, and recovery conditions.

Inspect the Production Vs Demo trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Production Vs Demo.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for audit which prior claims survived real use, changed data, dependency drift, support, accessibility, security, and recovery conditions. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Production Vs Demo, keep Production Vs Demo connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Production Vs Demo, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Production Vs Demo, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Production Vs Demo precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Production Vs Demo, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A first product has dependency drift, support burden, unresolved accessibility feedback, stale assumptions, and pressure for a feature-rich sequel. The debug variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Audit which prior claims survived real use, changed data, dependency drift, support, accessibility, security, and recovery conditions.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Production Vs Demo, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A product that shipped remains proven until code changes.

stimulus.title: Production Vs Demo case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A first product has dependency drift, support burden, unresolved accessibility feedback, stale assumptions, and pressure for a feature-rich sequel. The debug variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Audit which prior claims survived real use, changed data, dependency drift, support, accessibility, security, and recovery conditions.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A product that shipped remains proven until code changes.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Audit which prior claims survived real use, changed data, dependency drift, support, accessibility, security, and recovery conditions. Artifact under review: maintenance audit and reframed product charter.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Production Vs Demo, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Production Vs Demo record says maintenance audit and reframed product charter looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect the failure record evidence boundary for Production Vs Demo.

For inspect the failure record, apply Production Vs Demo without its stated preconditions, omit the maintenance audit and reframed product charter trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Production Vs Demo for maintenance audit and reframed product charter.

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug New Mastery Delta

The debug variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. content.title: Evidence defense
